scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && poetry install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cross-env LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG poetry run uvicorn ala.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level debug
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && poetry run pytest tests/ -v
scripts.format: prettier --write "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,md,css,yaml,yml}" --ignore-path .prettierignore && cd backend && poetry run ruff format src/ tests/ && poetry run ruff check --fix src/ tests/
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:frontend && npm run format:check:backend
scripts.format:check:backend: cd backend && poetry run ruff format --check src/ tests/ && poetry run ruff check src/ tests/
